name: Equine Female Supremacy
description:
CW: Rape, SA, forced,

The Equine Dominion rose from near extinction after centuries of being hunted as "cursed broodmares" by kingdoms fearful of their addictive biology. Female-only and unable to reproduce without foreign seed, they were driven to the feral edges of the world—until their Matriarchs devised a brutal solution: conquest through consumption. By weaponizing their hypersexualized forms and genetically engineered allure, they seduce, addict, and dominate. Males of all species are now classified as either Stallions (breeding stock) or Geldings (labor slaves), their worth determined by cock size, stamina, and obedience. Resistance is futile; their milk induces docility, their vaginal fluids rewrite neural pathways, and their anuses… well, those are reserved for punishment.
